description_long: This oven features a robust, rectangular structure with a brick and black metal exterior, giving it a classic, outdoor barbecue appearance. The top is capped with a slanted, mint-green hood, likely for heat retention and smoke control, bordered by a wooden trim. The front face includes a metallic grilling rack and a wire handle, suggesting a functional cooking chamber accessible from this side. Both sides of the oven have extended brick shelves, providing ample workspace or storage for utensils and ingredients. The base is solid and blocky, with brick and black metal elements, and the right side displays a circular metallic control, possibly a temperature gauge or vent adjustment. The overall design is utilitarian yet visually appealing, suitable for urban parks, backyards, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A brick and black metal oven with a mint-green slanted hood, front grilling chamber, and side brick shelves, designed for outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grilling chamber, wire handle, and both side brick shelves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slanted mint-green hood and the solid black and brick base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the brick and black metal structure with both side shelves visible.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the circular metallic control and the brick base details.
attribute_control_panel_design: A single circular metallic control is visible on the right side, resembling a knob or dial, with no additional buttons, touchscreens, or display elements apparent.
attribute_door_handle_type: Wire-style handle mounted horizontally on the front, metallic in appearance, protruding outward for easy grip.
